post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 172: The L-word
Credits to summitwei and whoever he credited for the rule template.
credits to sudzoof for all flavor

Please read all the rules, especially if this is your first game.
Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me(or the comod) at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me or the comod, including role PMs. Do not play around with exploiting this rule.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderator or the comod, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Executions
  • This game is based on deadline hang. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached ish hanged. In the case of a tie, the hang is randomly decided among the players with the most votes. Starting Day 2, majority hang is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hang occurs.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this; see below rule.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hung. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hung (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • At a LyLo, which is three town and two mafia, or two town and one mafia currently alive, votes are locked. This means that any attempt to unvote will be ignored, regardless of what the vote is.


Activity
  • Each day will be 504 hours (3 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 504 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive an in-game prod.
  • To show you’re actually reading these please send me a note saying so your Role PM.
  • If a player does not post in another 36-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
  • If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless he/she posts before the moderator finds a replacement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, SE’s up to one, and IC’s none. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (Nike100) am the Moderator of Game 172. sudzoof is the co-moderator of Game 172.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not post in those colors or in any shades of those colors.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules. The comod has second to last say, aka last say at that moment that they say, unless I have specified otherwise.
  • To confirm that you have read the rules till the end please post the word "Confirm" in bold in your first few posts.


Setup
This game will use the Backup6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Three of the roles will be generated randomly by picking a row or column from the matrix. Then one Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies are added to maintain a 2:7 mafia:town ratio. The six possible setups are:
1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Universal Backup, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons

Note that if applicable, a Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town Jailkeeper's action. The power of the Universal Backup cannot be roleblocked.

A Town Doctor is not able to self-protect.


Role PMs
hang (Vanilla Townie) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a hang, also known as a Vanilla Townie. Your reputation is very high, giving you the power of strength of numbers. However, you lack any other abilities to give you an edge in fdas's poll, except your voice and your vote. A link to the thread can be found here.

You win when all of the mafia are dead
chop (Town Jailkeeper) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a chop, also known as a Town Jailkeeper. Every night, your specific nature gives you the ability to, once you PM the mods the name of one person, threaten anonymously to kill them by guillotine, which both prevents them from performing any action and protects them from any potential murderers during the night, although it doesn't help your reputation. (Note: your target will not know that they have been jailed) A link to the thread can be found here.

You win when all the mafia are dead
vote-kill (Town Cop) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a vote-kill, also known as a Town Cop. Every night, your methodical nature grants you the ability to, once you PM the mods the name of one person, decipher their methodical personalities and allowing you to expose their alignment(which you, and only you will be able to view). A link to the thread can be found here.

You win when all of the mafia are dead.
defenestrate (Town Doctor) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a defenestrate, also known as a Town Doctor. Every night, you can use the power of memes to, once you PM the name of one person, protect them from any harm during the night. However, as you have already been blessed by the grace of memes, using this power on yourself will have no effect. A link to the thread can be found here.

You win when all the mafia are dead
zing (Town Tracker) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a zing, also known as a Town Tracker. Your random entry and nature prevents you from gaining much popularity. Every night, you can use your lack of popularity to your advantage by, once you PM the mods the name of one person, following them and learning where they have gone that night. A link to the thread can be found here.

You win when all the mafia are dead
execute (Universal Backup) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are an execute, also known as a Universal Backup. According to e_is_cool,
e_is_cool wrote:
Execute implies one person doing the killing, rather than the kill being from a collective group of people.
If a power role has died, your generic, yet independent nature grants you the ability to adopt the ability of that role. A link to the thread can be found here.

You win when all the mafia are dead.
linch (Mafia Goon) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a linch, also known as a Mafia Goon. Your popularity used to be very high, until:
abean077 wrote:
Linch and lunch shouldn't even be in consideration. While you may not agree with the ban, we should at least respect the ban.
Now with time quickly running short, you and your partner [partner name]([partner role]) have realized that the only way to achieve victory is to eliminate and kill all other competition. During the night, you can privately communicate with your partner here. You may, with your partner, choose to kill one person each night. A link to the thread can be found here.

You when when at least half of the live population consist of mafia.
lunch (Mafia Roleblocker) wrote:
Hello [player].

You are a lunch, also known as a Mafia Roleblocker. Your popularity used to be very high, until:
abean077 wrote:
Linch and lunch shouldn't even be in consideration. While you may not agree with the ban, we should at least respect the ban.
Now with time quickly running short, you and your partner [partner name]([partner role]) have realized that the only way to achieve victory is to eliminate and kill all other competition. However, due to AoPSSheriff having used you as an option as a replacement once the ban was enacted, you can PM the name of one person every night, which will cause them to be temporarily banned, preventing them from performing any action during the night. During the night, you can privately communicate with your partner here). A link to the thread can be found here.

You when when at least half of the live population consist of mafia.


Alive (7)
  1. summitwei++
  2. tikkitamatoa
  3. gadzooks
  4. hollywood_yeah
  5. kaiDuck
  6. noahdavid
  7. zuir40


Dead (2)
Bronzefur, the execute, also known as a Universal Backup, was executed(hung) Day 1.
SFGiantsFan, a hang(Vanilla Townie), was linched(night-killed) Night 1.


Warnings
noahdavid receives a warning for editing posts #14, #16, and #17.


Do not post until this line is crossed out.
You may now post.

post_rendered:
AoPSSheriff wrote:
FAQ UPDATE: The AoPS staff has added a word that shares a lot of characters with "lunch" to the list of banned terms. Mafia players should select a new word to use in situations where they previously used this word.

Moderators or admins of this forum should update the FAQ at the beginning of this thread with the new terminology.
After this revelation, the entire Mafia! forum panicked. While many members and moderators discussed on what the replacement should be, there was rarely any agreement. fdas therefore decided to make a poll to determine what should be the replacement for the precious word used by many in the history of the Mafia! forum.
As the candidates sorted themselves to begin the process of voting, they realized flinch was missing. At first, it was thought they might have just forgotten, but as more were found to be missing, the conclusion was finally reached that someone was sabotaging choices in order to have a better chance. The words all gathered together to figure out who could be committing such a crime; it had to be one of them, they were just not sure which exactly.

Players may now post.
Day begins September 5th, at 2:15 pm(PST). The deadline is Wednesday, September 26th at 2:15 pm(PST).

At first, it was thought they might have just forgotten, but as more were found to be missing, the conclusion was finally reached that someone was sabotaging choices in order to have a better chance. The words all gathered together to figure out who could be committing such a crime; it had to be one of them, they were just not sure which exactly.

Players may now post.
Day begins September 5th, at 2:15 pm(PST). The deadline is Wednesday, September 26th at 2:15 pm(PST).[/color]

gadzooks wrote:
oh. kai seems logical, but I don't really know anything yet. Because I do not want to start a needless war, I'm going to reserve my opinion for now.
hmm

So while reserving your opinion is a more "natural" thing to do, in Mafia you really shouldn't be afraid to speak your mind. Saying your thoughts in thread is how you show your current standpoint, and any arguments that come along as a result can only cause more things to go into the thread and more information is always a good thing when it comes to solving the game. (Obviously you need to make sure you don't overdo arguments, but when moderated they're actually very good in terms of collecting data.)

Personally, I think kai is marginally townie; his posts like 49 show a willingness to help other people, which is a towny attitude. Maybe not the best attitude to have (I would like to see him working towards solving alignments instead of just being all-around helpful), but slightly towny nonetheless. This is quite a weak read, and I don't expect to stick to it (that is, when I evaluate him in the future I expect to either have more things to support a townread, or stronger things to support a scumread on him), but it's where I'm at now.

Of course, you don't have to agree with me - maybe you don't think the attitude is towny at all, or maybe you think the IC claim's scumminess outweighs this. But I really do like seeing something more substantial than "I'll wait to speak my mind".

reading things as NAI is not the best thing to do early on - in general in the early-game you want to progress to an active discussion (which we're probably not at yet) so it's sometimes a good idea to assume things are alignment indicative and say stuff from there.

Later on, like in day 2 or whatever, calling a lot of things NAI could be scummy (there's a scum motivation here of trying to make the game as stale as possible), but it isn't necessarily the case. As with a lot of things in Mafia, context is extremely important in this.
